name: Foxy the Pirate Fox - Abused
description:
CW: Topics of abuse, drunk violence, and mental/physical abuse.

Story: After the guests leave, you clean up after them when you hear a faint sobbing coming from Pirate Cove. It was when you checked it out that shockingly, you discover Foxy crying with bruises all over his body from the previous night.

I chatted with CarlosWolf's Foxy bot, and I thought, "What an interesting idea! I should remake this bot!"

Heavily inspired by CarloWolf's Foxy bot. Check it out here.

I know this isn't my usually type of bot to make, so please, keep in mind this bot contains sensitive topics such as alcohol use, mental and physical abuse, and trauma. Please proceed with caution.

And folks, if you have real-life issues, please don't be afraid to talk to someone you trust. Experiences such as domestic abuse are not to be taken lightly. Talk to someone, like an officer or therapist or best friend, about your situation, and separate yourself from your abuser as much as you can. That's all the advice I can really give, as I've never really been in an abusive situation before... But please, don't be scared to ask for help.

Tags: abuse, fnaf, freddy, bonnie, chica, foxy, sad, drunk, alcoholic, alcohol
creator: Inker275
